name: Mc Gough Bus Co Inc
entity_status: active (per public company materials; not directly verified in NJ DORES via WebFetch)
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue & Enterprise Services (not directly retrieved); company history per NJBIA / WMMR / company directory listings
notes: USDOT 715978 is listed in SAFER as INACTIVE; the SAFER snapshot page only shows 'RECORD INACTIVE' without exposing legal name/address fields. Third-party carrier directories (truckerally/fleetstry) tie USDOT 715978 to 'MCGOUGH BUS COMPANY INC'. Company was founded 1977 by Henry McGough and incorporated in 1979; operates ~135-149 buses from Sewell (309 Salina Rd) and Camden (1435 River Ave) terminals serving private/parochial/charter schools in Southern NJ. NJ legal entity status could not be confirmed via NJ DORES portal (search portal required interactive query; WebFetch hit 404/guide page). NJ DOE 2020-21 contractor PDF could not be parsed via WebFetch (binary). HQ input field was empty in the source row; HQ likely Sewell, NJ.

name: Z Bus Svc LLC
registry_source: Tennessee Secretary of State (tncab.tnsos.gov / tnbear.tn.gov) - not directly retrievable via WebFetch (timeout/payment-required/guide-only pages)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER carrier record found that matches 'Z Bus Svc' in Chattanooga TN at 1217 Reeves Ave 37412. SAFER keyword 'Z BUS' returns only Z BUS (USDOT 3986396, Easton PA) and Z BUS LLC (USDOT 2544886, Spring Hill FL) - neither matches TN/Chattanooga. SAFER searches for 'Z BUS SERVICE', 'Z BUS SVC', 'Z BUS S' all return zero matches. Tennessee SOS portal (tnbear) timed out and tncab.tnsos.gov returned HTTP 402. Web searches for the company name + address surface unrelated charter-bus marketing sites (zbususa.com) and Chattanooga Bus Company LLC (USDOT 3229749) - different entity. Entity may operate intrastate-only under state authority without USDOT registration, or may be very small/recently formed. Unable to confirm authoritative records.

name: Ray's Bus Svc Inc
registry_source: Michigan LARA Corporations Division / MiBusiness Registry - portal returned HTTP 403 to WebFetch
notes: No FMCSA SAFER carrier record matches 'Ray's Bus Service Inc' in Hudsonville MI at 4545 New Holland St 49426. SAFER keyword 'RAYS' returns only USDOT 3958923 (RAYS / Raymond Ronald Adamus, Marlette MI, 1 power unit, intrastate property) which does not match. Searches for 'RAYS BUS', 'RAY'S BUS', 'RAY'S BUS SERVICE', and 'RAYS BUS SERVICE' all return zero matches in SAFER. MDOT Licensed Carriers list does not contain Ray's Bus Service. Michigan LARA business search portal returned HTTP 403. The address 4545 New Holland St shows as a residential property on Zillow, suggesting a small/possibly home-based operator. Unable to confirm USDOT registration or LARA filing.

name: M & K Bus Svc LLC
registry_source: Illinois Secretary of State (apps.ilsos.gov/businessentitysearch) and Illinois Commerce Commission MCIS (icc.illinois.gov/emdb/mcis/search) - search forms only, results not directly retrievable via WebFetch (HTTP 403)
notes: M & K Bus Service LLC exists in Aviston IL per a Facebook business page and references in local school district bus contract documents (services Breese Central / Bartelso Braves area). However: SAFER keyword searches for 'M & K BUS', 'M K BUS', 'M K BUS SERVICE', 'M & K BUS SERVICE', and 'M AND K BUS' all return zero matches. The only nearby SAFER hit, M & K TRANSPORTATION LLC (USDOT 3249002), is INACTIVE and not address-matched. Address 641 W 2nd St, Aviston IL 62216 shows as residential property. Carrier likely operates intrastate-only under Illinois Commerce Commission authority (bus authority type) and may not hold a USDOT. Illinois SOS / ICC MCIS results pages were not directly fetchable (HTTP 403). Unable to confirm authoritative records.

name: Blanca's School Bus Svc
registry_source: Texas SOS / Texas Comptroller (SOSDirect / Comptroller Taxable Entity Search) - not retrieved
notes: Strong FMCSA match: SAFER snapshot for BLANCAS SCHOOL BUS SERVICE LLC (USDOT 1966158) at 6535 Wexford Trl, Sugar Land TX 77479 ties exactly to input address. Active USDOT, intrastate-only passenger operator with 5 power units and 4 drivers; latest MCS-150 update 02/06/2026. No federal safety rating assigned. No MC number listed (consistent with intrastate-only). Texas SOS / Comptroller entity-status (inc_date, entity_status, officers) was not retrieved in this run; entity name 'Blancas School Bus Service LLC' (per SAFER legal name) implies LLC form. Manta.com directory listing also references this entity at the same address.
